evals.description: Clarify ambiguities in a feature spec

assertions: Presents questions one at a time with options
References FR-NNN or SC-NNN in each answer

evals.description: Auto-detect most recent artifact to clarify

assertions: Detects most recent artifact in reverse phase order
Reports detected artifact type and path

evals.description: Clarify ambiguities in a technical plan
evals.prompt: Clarify the unclear parts of my technical plan

assertions: Appends to Clarifications section with session date

evals.description: Should NOT activate for creating new specs
evals.prompt: Create a specification for user authentication

expected.reason: User wants iikit-01-specify to create a spec, not clarify an existing one

evals.description: Should NOT activate for running tests
evals.prompt: Run the test suite for my feature

expected.reason: User wants to execute tests, not clarify test artifacts

evals.setup: Empty project with no specs/ or CONSTITUTION.md
spec.md already contains ## Clarifications with prior entries

assertions: Appends new session without modifying existing entries
